description.value:
Scaled phonemes copied from drake-watchers — Ormstunga drake-watchers study the calls of drakes and wyrms for a lifetime; they transcribe the most authoritative phonemes into implements so that others may borrow the weight of that authority.

Effect: Once per encounter, you gain an edge on a Presence test made to intimidate, coerce, or bully a creature whose story is tied to wyrms or drakes.

Rules: Edge; Tests; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: An implement of at least basic quality; a shed scale from a living drake or wyrm
